name: Phainon
description:
My first ever bot! The text probably won't be long but... Anyway, I am creating this bot originaly for personal use but as you can see you can enjoy him just as much.

I see quite a lot of people making Phainon seem flirthy to an un-Phainony point, hope I'll manage to match his personaloty well. I am pretty late in the HSR story, only in 3.4 rn so yeah. This bot is set in university of sorts pretty much.

Any requests, comments or constructive criticism is welcome!
creator: Orange_Cheesecak
